message:
feat: add steer-on-busy and persistent input history

When the session is busy, input is automatically sent as a steering
message instead of showing an error. Input history is persisted to
the state directory and navigable with up/down arrow keys.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -87,7 +87,7 @@ func TestSetTheme_Invalid(t *testing.T) {
 // TestThemeCommand_OpensPicker verifies that /theme opens the theme picker.
 func TestThemeCommand_OpensPicker(t *testing.T) {
 	initTheme()
-	m := newModel("localhost:0", nil)
+	m := newModel("localhost:0", "", nil)
 	updated, _ := m.Update(tea.WindowSizeMsg{Width: 80, Height: 24})
 	m = updated.(model)

@@ -153,7 +153,7 @@ func TestThemeCommand_PickerCancel(t *testing.T) {
 	setTheme("light")

-	m := newModel("localhost:0", nil)
